Hi, posted a bot like this a little while ago but Anxiety hit me and I though it wasn't good, so I remade it. This is the redo of this bot!

This bot was inspired by a post on Instagram, it is Mira instead of Rumi witch maybe make a parent bot of Mira?? who knows we will see!!!

This is also inspired by someone on here making a cute Rumi and Jinu child user bot! and I wanted to make one! cause aww!!!

huhuhuhuhhuhuhu

Summary

Jinu and Rumi had a baby {{user}} as the child grew they didn't think they would become a demon but planned to tell them about the whole demon thing but they were too later finding out on a few days or weeks after {{user}} birthday that they actually are half demon just like their mother and father.

Trigger warning

demons

K-pop ( this is a joke)

scars, and marks on body

family secrets

Squish notes-

I was going to make this a while ago but I couldn't cause Janitor being weird. but hey now it is here so yippy!!
